summary: Identified 3 signals covering payment failure frequency, cumulative missed obligations, and delinquency duration — all directly relevant to repayment behaviour.

signal_rationale.emi_bounce_count: measures frequency of EMI payment failures — higher values indicate worse repayment behaviour
signal_rationale.missed_payment_count: tracks cumulative number of missed payment obligations over the observation window
signal_rationale.days_past_due: captures both recency and duration of delinquency — a key indicator of current credit stress
